name: Alteration Glyph
effect: Rerolls all affixes. Cannot reroll Class Affixes.

name: Augmentation Glyph
effect: Add an affix to an item up to 2 affixes.

name: Revision Glyph
effect:
1. Reroll the random Subtypes on an item’s affixes, or
2. Reroll a Class Affix within known classes.

Subtypes include affixes with multiple outcomes. For example, damage type, creature type, skills, etc.

name: Chaotic Glyph
effect: Use on a nonmagical item with no affixes to randomly modify the item.

name: Exalted Glyph
effect: Add an affix to an item up to 4, if the item rarity supports it.

name: Intrinsic Glyph
effect: Reroll the Innate affix(es) within the same Item Type.

name: Expertise Glyph
effect: Add a class affix to a ring wthat has no class affixes and has an unused affix slot. Class affixes roll within all classes than a character has at least 1 level in.

name: Tainted Glyph
effect:
Irreversably corrupt an item. Randomly modifies the item with chances of changing the item, changing the affixes, adding tainted affixes, and more.

Tainted items:
• can have duplicate affixes,
• exceed the maximum affix limit,
• ignore limitations, such as the 2 Class Affixes limit,
• become incredibly difficult to break or destroy, and
• Can never be modified again. (Topical effects like oils and temporary spells will still function.)

name: Hollowing Glyph
effect: Add a socket to an item with an unused affix slot.

name: Infusion Glyph
effect: Usable on any nonmagical item. Transform the item into a random Magic Item matching its Item Type.

name: Ascension Glyph
effect: Upgrade a random Affix to Tier 3.

name: Fortification Glyph
effect: Add a second Innate Affix within Item Type.

name: Preservation Glyph
effect: Freeze a random affix. This affix can no longer be changed or modified.

name: Seizure Glyph
effect: Remove a random affix from an item and store it as an Explicit Shard.

name: Ambitious Glyph
effect:
A glyph that modifies the effects of other glyphs.
Alternatively, change an item into a Cards of Chaos card:
 • Wonderous or 3+ Affix Item – Draw 1 Card
 • Very Rare or 4+ Affix Item – Draw 2 Cards
 • Legendary or Tainted 4+ Affix Item – Draw 3 Cards
 • Artifact or Tainted 6+ Affix Item – The whole Deck.
